contradictions.summary: The call implied onboarding could start next week with production roster data, while the DPA says production student roster processing cannot begin until DPA approval and sandbox validation are complete.

claimA.text: We should be able to start onboarding next week with that roster.

claimB.text: Production student roster data processing cannot begin until DPA approval and sandbox validation are complete.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Use sandbox-only wording and block any production-roster processing claims before DPA approval and sandbox validation.

contradictions.summary: The call statement could be read as starting with production data, while the proposal says onboarding may begin with sandbox data only.

claimA.text: We should be able to start onboarding next week with that roster.

claimB.text: Onboarding may begin with sandbox data only.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Clarify that next week's onboarding means sandbox onboarding, not production roster processing.

contradictions.summary: The safe call language says sandbox onboarding can begin next week, but the onboarding plan says sandbox roster import is blocked until Ridgeway provides the sandbox roster by May 27.

claimA.text: We can begin sandbox onboarding next week and map the roster format before production import.

claimB.text: Sandbox roster import is blocked until Ridgeway provides the sandbox roster by 2026-05-27.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Track sandbox onboarding as dependent on the customer's sandbox roster delivery.
